An isolated manual relay-bot end-to-end harness captured detach/history evidence for VAL-CROSS-004 and disconnect/grace/reconnect/expiry evidence for VAL-CROSS-014 in /home/dl/.factory/missions/33afaa22-b81b-48d3-b9b3-131d99d630c7/evidence/feishu-bot/cross-rerun/manual-cross-rerun-check.json.

assertions.title: Detach stops message forwarding end-to-end
assertions.reason: After /detach, the local prompt still reached mock codex stdin and echoed on wrapper stdout, proving the wrapper kept local proxying active; the resulting agentMessage delta was retained in relay history, and Feishu never received that post-detach content (only the brief turn-completed notification).

assertions.title: Wrapper disconnect — grace period, user notification, reconnect resume
assertions.reason: A forced wrapper disconnect put the session into grace with online=false and graceExpiresAt set, notified the attached chat that the session went offline, then resumed on the same session ID with the same executing state, attached user, and preserved pre-disconnect history; after a later full stop, the session was evicted with HTTP 404 once the grace window expired.
